metadata.description: Scriptorium for Claude Cowork — evidence-first, PRISMA-audited literature review. Connector-agnostic; works with whatever scholarly-search and document MCPs you have connected.

plugins.name: scriptorium-cowork
plugins.description: Cowork-only edition of Scriptorium. No CLI, no hooks, no shell — pure skills + MCP. Every claim locator-cited, every search/screen decision logged, contradictions named instead of averaged.
